title: Muffin's Picnic
description: Add Picnic Basket to carry items and hangout!
body:
![Imgur](https://imgur.com/41zxRZD.jpeg)

***

Heavily inspired by [OMORI](https://store.steampowered.com/app/1150690/OMORI/)

## About
***
Add 16 Color Picnic Baskets to Minecraft. Picnic Baskets could store items for 9 slots and you can carry it anywhere, similar to Shulker Boxes.

![Picnic Basket shows item inside, similar to Bundle.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fcf82b00c2cff637e2655254754f6fd238179604.png)

![Picnic spawns in plains villages](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a569123f1817ce0543d06a1663335624e65f32b4.jpeg)
